3.  Canopy Tent Fabric Covers

# Canopy Tent Fabric Covers

![Custom canopy tent cover only | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/web.png)

Beat the heat and promote your brand with an easily-to-assemble and custom tent! These canopy tents are perfect for keeping out of the rain or harmful sun rays and have waterproof and UV-resistant canopy fabric. Trust our 10’ x 10’ fabric tents to be your reliable buddy, providing a stylish and reliable shelter solution for any occasion.

*   [Create your Product](#cust)
*   [Product Dimensions](#5089c547-8c0d-4b30-a624-6df5e4023acf)
*   [Materials](#8701bedc-bf53-4311-addb-d169bdd1e7b7)
*   [Warranty](#5594e2aa-abc0-47cf-9f66-d4db941af76d)
*   [Templates](#c9a3256c-2dc9-495e-b68d-e3fe9374da7e)
*   [Production](#047d241f-5ca8-4f01-a007-9990a253b1bf)

### Product Dimensions

Product Size: 118.75" W x 84" H x 118.75" D  
Product Weight: 8.5 lbs  
Packing Size:17x17x6''/13lbs

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Materials

Canopy: 600 Denier Polyester

This canopy is constructed of durable, weather-resistant 600 denier polyester. We use a full-color dye sublimation\* process on the white canopy so that the colors chosen for the custom artwork submitted are crisp, vivid, and clear. 

\*Dye sublimation is the process of fully sturating the fabric versus simply printing on top of it. This allows the color to appear more vivid than other printing varieties.  
 

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### One Year Canopy Warranty

_1 Year Canopy Warranty_ \- Standard warranty is a parts and labor warranty which warrants product against defects in material and workmanship. It does not cover damage due to accidents, abuse, or normal wear and tear. Products found to be defective will be replaced or repaired at factory's discretion.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### 10' x 10' Canopy Tent Templates

10' x 10' Canopy Tent Templates

[**EPS**](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-06-BANS-4x8 Lind Frame template.eps)

[![](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft Canopy Template.eps)10 x 10 Canopy Tent EPS Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft Canopy Template.eps)

[**PDF**](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-06-BANS-4x8 Lind Frame template.pdf)

[![](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft canopy template (1).pdf)10 x 10 Canopy Tent PDF Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft canopy template \(1\).pdf)

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Production Process

You will receive a proof of your design _within 24 hours of your order_. Once you approve of your design, our team will put your canopy into production. We will produce and ship your tent within 24 hours of your proof being approved.   
  
Please allow 5-7 days for shipping. Due to the size and nature of this product, it will be shipped via UPS Ground Shipping. Your ETA for delivery is 5-7 days _after_ your proof has been approved.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

      

×

#### Upload a Print Ready File

Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.

**For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.**

## Frequently Asked Questions

#### Can I use multiple colors in the canopy design?

Yes! We print on the fabric via a technique known as full color dye-sublimation, which saturates the cloth rather than printing on the fabric surface. This enables for more vibrant color and precise detailing. You can incorporate as many colors and photographs as you want into your design.

#### Is this tent travel-friendly?

Yes! This tent is designed for travel and outdoor use, making it ideal for both businesses wishing to market their products and individuals searching for a unique travel option to avoid rain and damaging sun rays.

#### How do I clean and maintain a canopy tent?

Cleaning the canopy cloth on a regular basis entails using mild soap, water, and a gentle brush, followed by thorough drying before storage. To preserve the durability of the tent, it is crucial to check it for any damage or signs of wear and tear, such as bent frames or tears, and address them promptly to ensure the longevity of the tent. 

#### What is the size of this tent when collapsed?

The collapsed and storage dimensions of this custom tent is approximately 9.12" W x 62.75" H x 9.12" D when stored correctly.

#### What is the fabric material on this canopy made from?

This canopy is made from 600 Denier Polyester.

#### Where can I purchase a canopy frame?

You can purchase a canopy frame from Banners.com by either heading over to our [Tent Frames](https://www.banners.com/custom-canopy-tents/10-foot-aluminum-canopy-tent-frame) page, or by purchasing our full [10 Foot Canopy Tent Kit](https://www.banners.com/custom-canopy-tents/10-foot-canopy-tent-kit) that has both the frame and the cover in one kit.

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
